title: Boston Scientific (BSX) Closes the Relievant Medsystems Buyout
text: Boston Scientific (BSX) expands the neuromodulation portfolio with the acquisition of Relievant Medsystems.

title: Boston Scientific Closes Acquisition of Relievant Medsystems, Inc.
text: Recent healthcare plan coverage of Intracept® system expands access to vertebrogenic pain treatment for tens of millions of patients MARLBOROUGH, Mass. , Nov. 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) today announced the close of its acquisition of Relievant Medsystems Inc., a company that offers the only U.S. Food and Drug Administration-cleared Intracept® Intraosseous Nerve Ablation System, a therapy to treat vertebrogenic pain that is a form of chronic low back pain.

title: Boston Scientific (BSX) Just Reclaimed the 50-Day Moving Average

title: Boston Scientific to Participate in Stifel's 2023 Healthcare Conference
